summary: One-line Kirby fighter decomp fix: in src/melee/ft/chara/ftKirby/ftKb_SpecialNZd.c, ftKb_SkSpecialAirNEnd_Coll now calls the common landing transition ftCo_Landing_Enter_Basic(gobj) after ft_80081D0C detects ground contact, instead of calling ftKb_SpecialNSk_80105E8C(gobj). The decomp.dev report shows the target item main/melee/ft/chara/ftKirby/ftKb_SpecialNZd ftKb_SkSpecialAirNEnd_Coll improved from 0.00% to 100.00% (+84 bytes).
what_changed: Changed ftKb_SkSpecialAirNEnd_Coll's grounded branch after ft_80081D0C(gobj) from ftKb_SpecialNSk_80105E8C(gobj) to ftCo_Landing_Enter_Basic(gobj).
Kept the preceding state field resets intact: fp->fv.kb.xB4 = 0 and fp->mv.kb.specialhi.x4 = 0.
No headers, structs, or additional source files were changed in the provided diff.
smart_moves: Identified that the collision callback's landing case should use the shared common landing enter routine rather than a Kirby-specific neutral-special helper.
Minimized risk by changing only the callee while preserving the surrounding condition and field stores.
Used the decomp.dev per-item report to validate the exact target function match: ftKb_SkSpecialAirNEnd_Coll reached 100.00%.
decomp_lessons: For aerial end collision callbacks, when a ground-contact predicate such as ft_80081D0C(gobj) succeeds, check common landing transition helpers like ftCo_Landing_Enter_Basic before assuming an action-specific transition routine.
A single wrong callee can be enough to prevent an otherwise small collision function from matching.
Preserving nearby state-reset ordering while only swapping the transition helper is a useful tactic when the branch structure already appears correct.

The bot report also listed effect-system match churn, but the only changed file in this PR was Kirby fighter code, so future readers should not infer an intentional effects-system refactor from this PR alone.
naming_conventions: ftKb_ prefix denotes Kirby fighter code in this slice.
ftKb_SkSpecialAirNEnd_Coll follows an action/callback suffix pattern where _Coll marks a collision callback.
ftCo_Landing_Enter_Basic names a common fighter landing-state entry helper.
ftKb_SpecialNSk_80105E8C retained an address-suffixed provisional name; this PR did not rename or document it.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Callee substitution was the matching lever: replace ftKb_SpecialNSk_80105E8C with ftCo_Landing_Enter_Basic without changing the conditional or stores.
Bot evidence: main/melee/ft/chara/ftKirby/ftKb_SpecialNZd item ftKb_SkSpecialAirNEnd_Coll changed from 0.00% to 100.00%, +84 bytes.
Overall GALE01 report showed matched code 59.22% with +740 bytes, but only +84 bytes are directly tied to the changed Kirby function in the report.
review_feedback: No human review comments were present in the PR slice.
decomp-dev[bot] posted the match report confirming the target function became a new match.
follow_up_queries: Find other aerial special _Coll functions that call action-specific helpers after ft_80081D0C and compare against ftCo_Landing_Enter_Basic.
Inspect ftKb_SpecialNSk_80105E8C callsites to determine its real role and whether its provisional name should be improved.
Search Kirby copied-special collision handlers for the same landing-transition pattern.
